ddls:
CREATE TABLE "instruments" (
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each financial instrument */,
  "symbol" TEXT /* Symbol or ticker of the financial instrument */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the financial instrument */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of the financial instrument (e.g., currency, stock, commodity) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the financial instrument */,
  "exchange" TEXT /* The exchange where the instrument is traded */,
  "currency" TEXT /* The base and quote currency for the instrument */,
  "sector" TEXT /* The sector of the instrument (e.g., technology, healthcare) */,
  "country" TEXT /* The country of origin for the instrument */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* The timestamp of the last update to the instrument's data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "price_data" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price data entry */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp of the price data */,
  "open_price" REAL /* Opening price of the instrument at the timestamp */,
  "high_price" REAL /* Highest price of the instrument at the timestamp */,
  "low_price" REAL /* Lowest price of the instrument at the timestamp */,
  "close_price" REAL /* Closing price of the instrument at the timestamp */,
  "volume" INTEGER /* Trading volume at the given timestamp */,
  "time_interval" TEXT /* The time interval of the price data (e.g., hourly, daily, weekly) */,
  "source" TEXT /* The source of the price data (e.g., external API, internal system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_price_data_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "market_events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each market event */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the market event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Exact time of the event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the market event */,
  "impact" TEXT /* Impact of the event on the market (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "location" TEXT /* The location where the event occurred */,
  "category" TEXT /* The category of the event (e.g., economic, political) */,
  "impact_description" TEXT /* A detailed description of the event's impact */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the economic indicator */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was released */,
  "region" TEXT /* The region to which the economic indicator applies */,
  "previous_value" REAL /* The previous value of the economic indicator */,
  "forecast_value" REAL /* The forecasted value of the economic indicator */,
  "revised_value" REAL /* The revised value of the economic indicator */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the economic indicator data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., trader, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* A hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* The timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* The user's account status (e.g., active, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user preference */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "preference_name" TEXT /* Name of the preference (e.g., chart_type, time_zone) */,
  "preference_value" TEXT /* Value of the preference */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* The user's preferred time zone */,
  "language" TEXT /* The user's preferred language */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_preferences_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the platform */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of the access */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., login, logout, view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* The user agent string of the user's device */,
  "request_method" TEXT /* The HTTP method used for the request (e.g., GET, POST) */,
  "response_status" INTEGER /* The HTTP response status code */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trading_signals" (
  "signal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trading signal */,
  "instrument_id" INTEGER /* ID of the financial instrument */,
  "signal_date" TEXT /* Date and time the signal was generated */,
  "signal_type" TEXT /* Type of the trading signal (e.g., buy, sell) */,
  "signal_strength" TEXT /* Strength of the trading signal (e.g., strong, weak) */,
  "strategy" TEXT /* The trading strategy used to generate the signal */,
  "confidence" REAL /* The confidence level of the signal (e.g., 0.75) */,
  "threshold" REAL /* The threshold value used for the signal (e.g., 5%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("signal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trading_signals_instrument_id FOREIGN KEY ("instrument_id") REFERENCES instruments ("instrument_id")
)
